name: Connected Boxes
description: Groups of 2-3 adjacent boxes linked by golden chains. Tap any one box in a group and ALL linked boxes fire their marbles at the same time!
howToPlay: Look for boxes connected by golden chain links. Tap any box in a connected group to release marbles from ALL boxes in that group simultaneously. Plan your taps to maximize color combos!
author: Claude

showcaseLevel.name: Connected Chaos
showcaseLevel.desc: 3 linked groups — tap one, fire all!
